calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:51am and concluding at 10:04am.

Plaintiff Ziel Equipment, Sales and Services Inc. appearing represented by Daniel King, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Frost Collective LLC not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff ARTNUR DE CORDOVA and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ziel Equipment, Sales and Services Inc., and against Defendant Frost Collective, LLC, as follows:

Damages: $41,419.30
Prejudgment Interest: $6,793.40
Attorney Fees: $5,108.50
Costs: $1,383.90

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $54,705.10

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Mar-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Ziel Equipment, Sales & Services Inc. appearing represented by Daniela King, Esq. via zoom
Defendant Frost Collective LLC not appearing.

Counsel was informed that a witness is required to proceed with the default hearing.

This matter is continued to March 6, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Plaitniff an oppertunity to have a witness appear.
